parameters.query: SELECT * FROM public.fn_listar_pedidos_modificables('{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono }}') WHERE es_modificable ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM public.fn_resolver_pedido_referencia(
  '{{ $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.telefono }}',
  '{{ String($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.referencia || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
